fato_historico: 1994: Rwandan genocide: The Rwandan Patriotic Front takes control of Gisenyi and north western Rwanda, forcing the interim government into Zaire and ending the genocide.
energia_do_dia: The cosmos invites you to release heavy burdens and step into a new dawn. Just as a long-awaited resolution brings light to the darkest landscapes, you may find that today is a perfect moment to welcome clarity. Perhaps it is time to cultivate deep hope, allowing your resilient spirit to plant seeds of joy and harmony in your path.
frase_do_dia: Your bright spirit can transform any shadow into a beautiful, lasting sunrise.
significado_numero: A powerful number representing the manifestation of dreams into reality.
conselho: Consider letting go of old worries to make room for unexpected new blessings.
